This GO-14 Medium Tote is crafted from exquisite sheepskin leather, featuring a quilted pattern inspired by the brand's traditional luggage design. The Twist lock adds a striking touch, while the top handle can be carried alone or converted into a leather shoulder pad with a sliding chain strap for a comfortable shoulder or crossbody experience.
Dimensions: 23 x 16 x 10cm

This GO-14 Medium Tote is crafted from exquisite sheepskin leather, featuring a quilted pattern inspired by the brand's traditional luggage design. The Twist lock adds a striking touch, while the top handle can be carried alone or converted into a leather shoulder pad with a sliding chain strap for a comfortable shoulder or crossbody experience.
Dimensions: 23 x 16 x 10cm

items.name_en: Dynamic Chip M45256 Black M45306 Blue M46526 Milky White Top-tier Original M45307 Milky White with Brown Top-tier Original NéoNoé Medium Tote Bag Crafted from Monogram Empreinte embossed leather, it exudes elegance with leather drawstrings and delicate eyelets. The lightweight structure fits the body's rhythm, cleverly using a removable top handle or detachable and adjustable shoulder strap for a comfortable experience whether carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody.
